title: amaryllis × retiflora
intro: Amaryllis × retiflora, commonly known as the belladonna lily or naked lady, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. The plant is known for its potential medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, derived from the alkaloids present in its bulbs. The health benefits of Amaryllis × retiflora include its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant's bulbs are often dried and used to make infusions or extracts, although its use should be approached with caution due to its potential toxicity.
